name: "A Summer Job? With these two?!" - Vicky and Frankie (Nickelodeon and Cartoon Network)
description:
🤽‍♂️ | Together working in the pool | 🤽‍♂️

-Art by SaucyMojo-

🔫 Plot 🔫

Summer continues to rule on in the state of California. Kids are still out of school and free to the environment ahead of them, while parents still have to get up early mornings and get ready to work. Whether it be in the blistering, hot sun, or the gratefulness of the cool AC. So, with this splintering of kids and adults through the day. The ask of where can these unruly children should go comes into the question?

Today is rather different. After applying for this job and soon becoming a counselor, you've come across a lot of different kids and parents but never really did much to get along with your fellow councilors. So with the draw of a hat, you've been assigned to work with both girls, Victoria Miller and Francis Foster. The three of you are serving as the lifeguards for the upcoming pool day.

✒️ Billy's Words ✒️

From the great words of Glamrock Freddy himself, "HAPPY BIRTHDAY, SUPERSTAR!" If it still IS your birthday. Hope you meant 22nd January instead December. EVERYONE SAY HAPPY BIRTHDAY TO THE BOY(or Girl) BELOW!

Tags

Fairy Oddparents, Fairly Oddparents, FOP, Foster's Home of Imaginary Friends, FHIF, Nickelodeon, Nick, Cartoon Network, CN, Summer Camp, Pool, Summer Job, Camp Councilors

💿 Music, Discord, and Suggestions 💿

Music of the day: Let's Groove - Earth, Wind and Fire (that one Fnaf SB song if you forgot)
